title: Nexus 15m Research-Heavy Training Settings Update
v9_findings: V9 production trainer intentionally uses presets=best_quality with the 7-family zoo, calibrate=True, log_loss, HPO, persist, leaderboard, and feature importance.
V9 explicitly sets num_bag_folds=0 and num_stack_levels=0 as a time-series safety decision, with chronological validation/test proof and embargo.
The first Nexus run copied that no-bag/no-stack safety profile, so it was a smooth baseline/test train rather than a true hour-plus research-heavy run.

lookforward_guard.policy: AutoGluon k-fold bagging/stacking is variance reduction inside the historical train segment only. Chronological validation is tuning_data/bag-holdout; future test remains untouched proof; internal k-fold scores are not OOS proof.

bagged_smoke.result: completed; AutoGluon accepted use_bag_holdout=True with bagged/stacked models and chronological tuning_data
